title: ObsidianTNT
description: Adds Obsidian TNT which allows you to blow up bedrock
body:
A small plugin that adds an "immersive" bedrock breaker - Obsidian TNT crafted from... well... obsidian and TNT!

## Usage
Craft obsidian TNT using gunpowder and obsidian, place it near some bedrock and light it. The recipe is currently discovered by picking up gunpowder and obsidian but you can always craft it even without the recipe discovery for the recipe book.

## Requirements
- Java 21+
- PaperMC
- 1.21.X
